JOI-BLACK_HOLE_POWER.title: Black Hole
JOI-BLACK_HOLE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if this has 5 or more stacks, lose HP equal to the number of stacks and remove this power.
JOI-BLACK_HOLE_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, if this has 5 or more stacks, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP and remove this power.
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_POWER.title: White Hole
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if this has 5 or more stacks, deal damage equal to the number of stacks to ALL enemies, then lose 1 stack.
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, if this has 5 or more stacks, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies, then lose 1 stack.
JOI-BIRTH_POWER.title: Birth
JOI-BIRTH_POWER.description: Whenever Black Hole triggers, summon a ZhouXin with HP equal to Black Hole stacks. If one already exists, increase its HP by that amount.
JOI-BIRTH_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever Black Hole triggers, summon a ZhouXin with HP equal to Black Hole stacks. If one already exists, increase its HP by that amount.
JOI-OMNISCIENT_POWER.title: Omniscient
JOI-OMNISCIENT_POWER.description: Whenever you gain Black Hole, also gain that many White Hole stacks.
JOI-OMNISCIENT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain Black Hole, also gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] White Hole stacks.
JOI-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.title: Event Horizon
JOI-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.description: Whenever you gain Black Hole, gain Block.
JOI-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain Black Hole, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Block.
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_LENS_POWER.title: Gravitational Lens
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_LENS_POWER.description: Whenever you gain White Hole, deal damage to a random enemy.
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_LENS_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you gain White Hole, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
JOI-GRAVITY_FIELD_POWER.title: Gravity Field
JOI-GRAVITY_FIELD_POWER.description: Whenever you gain White Hole, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
JOI-GRAVITY_FIELD_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain White Hole, deal [blue]3[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
JOI-VACUUM_FLUCTUATION_POWER.title: Vacuum Fluctuation
JOI-VACUUM_FLUCTUATION_POWER.description: Each turn, the first time you gain Black Hole or White Hole, gain 1 Energy.
JOI-VACUUM_FLUCTUATION_POWER.smartDescri: Each turn, the first [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s) you gain Black Hole or White Hole, gain 1 Energy.
